'''{{PAGENAME}}''' is a Gaiad character mentioned in chapter(s) 19 and 21 and 24 and 25 and 27 and 28 and 39 and 40 and 49 and 59.

[[Category:Generated Gaiad character entries for the 1st 62 chapters]]
[[Category:Removed redirects]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:Newest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
